category_sources: source_facts.description says it parses CorelDRAW document formats.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the Document Foundation wiki page for the libcdr library.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; supplied official facts include the Document Foundation library page and LibreOffice source archive but no official source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CorelDRAW parsing; source_facts.executables lists cdr2text, cdr2xhtml, cmx2text, and cmx2xhtml.
